Rozwiazanie_System-do-analizy-częstości-tekstu.R

Karol

2026-03-10

readLines("C:/Users/Karol/Downloads/Biden2021.txt")
##   [1] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
##   [2] "Madame Speaker."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               
##   [3] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
##   [4] "Madame Vice President."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        
##   [5] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
##   [6] "No president has ever said those words from this podium, and it’s about time."                                                                                                                                                                                 
##   [7] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
##   [8] "The First Lady."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               
##   [9] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
##  [10] "The Second Gentleman."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
##  [11] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
##  [12] "Mr. Chief Justice."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
##  [13] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
##  [14] "Members of the United States Congress and the Cabinet – and distinguished guests."                                                                                                                                                                             
##  [15] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
##  [16] "My fellow Americans."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          
##  [17] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
##  [18] "While the setting tonight is familiar, this gathering is very different – a reminder of the extraordinary times we are in."                                                                                                                                    
##  [19] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
##  [20] "Throughout our history, Presidents have come to this chamber to speak to the Congress, to the nation, and to the world."                                                                                                                                       
##  [21] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
##  [22] "To declare war. To celebrate peace. To announce new plans and possibilities."                                                                                                                                                                                  
##  [23] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
##  [24] "Tonight, I come to talk about crisis — and opportunity."                                                                                                                                                                                                       
##  [25] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
##  [26] "About rebuilding our nation — and revitalizing our democracy."                                                                                                                                                                                                 
##  [27] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
##  [28] "And winning the future for America."                                                                                                                                                                                                                           
##  [29] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
##  [30] "As I stand here tonight — just one day shy of the 100th day of my administration."                                                                                                                                                                             
##  [31] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
##  [32] "100 days since I took the oath of office, lifted my hand off our family Bible, and inherited a nation in crisis."                                                                                                                                              
##  [33] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
##  [34] "The worst pandemic in a century."                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
##  [35] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
##  [36] "The worst economic crisis since the Great Depression."                                                                                                                                                                                                         
##  [37] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
##  [38] "The worst attack on our democracy since the Civil War."                                                                                                                                                                                                        
##  [39] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
##  [40] "Now, after just 100 days, I can report to the nation: America is on the move again."                                                                                                                                                                           
##  [41] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
##  [42] "Turning peril into possibility. Crisis into opportunity. Setback into strength."                                                                                                                                                                               
##  [43] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
##  [44] "Life can knock us down."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       
##  [45] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
##  [46] "But in America, we never stay down."                                                                                                                                                                                                                           
##  [47] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
##  [48] "In America, we always get up."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
##  [49] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
##  [50] "And today, that’s what we’re doing: America is rising anew."                                                                                                                                                                                                   
##  [51] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
##  [52] "Choosing hope over fear. Truth over lies. Light over darkness."                                                                                                                                                                                                
##  [53] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
##  [54] "After 100 Days of rescue and renewal, America is ready for takeoff."                                                                                                                                                                                           
##  [55] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
##  [56] "We are working again. Dreaming again. Discovering again. Leading the world again."                                                                                                                                                                             
##  [57] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
##  [58] "We have shown each other and the world: There is no quit in America."                                                                                                                                                                                          
##  [59] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
##  [60] "100 days ago, America’s house was on fire."                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
##  [61] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
##  [62] "We had to act."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
##  [63] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
##  [64] "And thanks to the extraordinary leadership of Speaker Pelosi and Majority Leader Schumer – and with the overwhelming support of the American people – Democrats, Independents, and Republicans – we did act."                                                  
##  [65] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
##  [66] "Together — we passed the American Rescue Plan."                                                                                                                                                                                                                
##  [67] "One of the most consequential rescue packages in American history."                                                                                                                                                                                            
##  [68] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
##  [69] "We’re already seeing the results."                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
##  [70] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
##  [71] "After I promised 100 million COVID-19 vaccine shots in 100 days – we will have provided over 220 million COVID shots in 100 days."                                                                                                                             
##  [72] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
##  [73] "We’re marshalling every federal resource. We’ve gotten the vaccine to nearly 40,000 pharmacies and over 700 community health centers."                                                                                                                         
##  [74] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
##  [75] "We’re setting up community vaccination sites, and are deploying mobile units into hard-to-reach areas."                                                                                                                                                        
##  [76] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
##  [77] "Today, 90% of Americans now live within 5 miles of a vaccination site."                                                                                                                                                                                        
##  [78] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
##  [79] "Everyone over the age of 16, everyone – is now eligible and can get vaccinated right away."                                                                                                                                                                    
##  [80] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
##  [81] "So get vaccinated now."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        
##  [82] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
##  [83] "When I was sworn in, less than 1% of seniors were fully vaccinated against COVID-19."                                                                                                                                                                          
##  [84] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
##  [85] "100 days later, nearly 70% of seniors are fully protected."                                                                                                                                                                                                    
##  [86] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
##  [87] "Senior deaths from COVID-19 are down 80% since January. Down 80%."                                                                                                                                                                                             
##  [88] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
##  [89] "And, more than half of all adults in America have gotten at least one shot."                                                                                                                                                                                   
##  [90] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
##  [91] "At a mass vaccination center in Glendale, Arizona, I asked a nurse what it’s like."                                                                                                                                                                            
##  [92] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
##  [93] "She looked and said every shot feels like a dose of hope."                                                                                                                                                                                                     
##  [94] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
##  [95] "A dose of hope for the educator in Florida who has a child who suffers from an auto-immune disease."                                                                                                                                                           
##  [96] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
##  [97] "She wrote to me that she was worried about bringing the virus home."                                                                                                                                                                                           
##  [98] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
##  [99] "When she got vaccinated, she sat in her car and just cried."                                                                                                                                                                                                   
## [100] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [101] "Cried out of joy, cried out of relief."                                                                                                                                                                                                                        
## [102] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [103] "Parents are seeing smiles on their kids’ faces as they go back to school because teachers and school bus drivers, cafeteria workers have been vaccinated."                                                                                                     
## [104] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [105] "Grandparents hugging their children and grandchildren instead of pressing their hands against a window to say goodbye"                                                                                                                                         
## [106] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [107] "It means everything to both of them."                                                                                                                                                                                                                          
## [108] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [109] "There’s still more work to do to beat this virus. We can’t let our guard down now."                                                                                                                                                                            
## [110] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [111] "But tonight, I can say because of you — the American people – our progress these past 100 days against one of the worst pandemics in history is one of the greatest logistical achievements our country has ever seen."                                        
## [112] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [113] "What else have we done these first 100 days?"                                                                                                                                                                                                                  
## [114] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [115] "We kept our commitment and we are sending $1,400 rescue checks to 85% of all American households."                                                                                                                                                             
## [116] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [117] "We’ve already sent more than 160 million checks out the door."                                                                                                                                                                                                 
## [118] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [119] "It’s making a difference."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     
## [120] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [121] "For many people, it’s making all the difference in the world."                                                                                                                                                                                                 
## [122] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [123] "A single mom in Texas wrote to me."                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
## [124] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [125] "She said when she couldn’t work, this relief check put food on the table"                                                                                                                                                                                      
## [126] "and saved her and her son from eviction."                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
## [127] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [128] "A grandmother in Virginia told me she immediately took her granddaughter to the eye doctor — something she put off for months because she didn’t have the money."                                                                                              
## [129] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [130] "One of the defining images of this crisis has been cars lined up for miles waiting for a box of food to be put in the trunk."                                                                                                                                  
## [131] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [132] "Did you ever think you’d see that in America?"                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
## [133] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [134] "That’s why the American Rescue Plan is delivering food and nutrition assistance to millions of Americans facing hunger – and hunger is down sharply already."                                                                                                  
## [135] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [136] "We’re also providing:"                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
## [137] "Rental assistance to keep people from being evicted from their homes. Providing loans to keep small businesses open and their employees on the job."                                                                                                           
## [138] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [139] "During these 100 days, an additional 800,000 Americans enrolled in the Affordable Care Act because I established a special sign up period to do that."                                                                                                         
## [140] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [141] "We’re making one of the largest one-time investments ever in improving health care for veterans."                                                                                                                                                              
## [142] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [143] "Critical investments to address the opioid crisis."                                                                                                                                                                                                            
## [144] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [145] "And, maybe most importantly, thanks to the American Rescue Plan, we are on track to cut child poverty in America in half this year."                                                                                                                           
## [146] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [147] "In the process, the economy created more than 1.3 million new jobs in 100 days."                                                                                                                                                                               
## [148] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [149] "More new jobs in the first 100 days than any president on record."                                                                                                                                                                                             
## [150] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [151] "The International Monetary Fund is now estimating our economy will grow at a rate of more than 6% this year."                                                                                                                                                  
## [152] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [153] "That will be the fastest pace of economic growth in this country in nearly four decades."                                                                                                                                                                      
## [154] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [155] "America is moving. Moving forward. And we can’t stop now."                                                                                                                                                                                                     
## [156] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [157] "We’re in a competition with China and other countries to win the 21st Century."                                                                                                                                                                                
## [158] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [159] "We have to do more than just build back. We have to build back better."                                                                                                                                                                                        
## [160] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [161] "Throughout our history, public investments and infrastructure have transformed America."                                                                                                                                                                       
## [162] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [163] "The transcontinental railroad and interstate highways united two oceans and brought us into a totally new age of progress."                                                                                                                                    
## [164] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [165] "Universal public school and college aid opened wide the doors of opportunity."                                                                                                                                                                                 
## [166] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [167] "Scientific breakthroughs took us to the Moon and now to Mars, discovered vaccines, and gave us the Internet and so much more."                                                                                                                                 
## [168] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [169] "These are the investments we make together, as one country, and that only government can make."                                                                                                                                                                
## [170] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [171] "Time and again, they propel us into the future."                                                                                                                                                                                                               
## [172] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [173] "That’s why I proposed The American Jobs Plan — a once-in-a-generation investment in America itself."                                                                                                                                                           
## [174] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [175] "The largest jobs plan since World War II."                                                                                                                                                                                                                     
## [176] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [177] "It creates jobs to upgrade our transportation infrastructure. Jobs modernizing roads, bridges and highways. Jobs building ports and airports, rail corridors and transit lines. It’s clean water."                                                             
## [178] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [179] "Today, up to 10 million homes and more than 400,000 schools and child care centers have pipes with lead in them, including for drinking water."                                                                                                                
## [180] " A clear and present danger to our children’s health."                                                                                                                                                                                                         
## [181] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [182] "The American Jobs Plan creates jobs replacing 100% of the nation’s lead pipes and service lines so every American, so every child – can turn on the faucet and be certain to drink clean water."                                                               
## [183] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [184] "It creates jobs connecting every American with high-speed internet, including 35% of rural Americans who still don’t have it."                                                                                                                                 
## [185] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [186] "This will help our kids and businesses succeed in a 21st Century economy."                                                                                                                                                                                     
## [187] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [188] "And I am asking the Vice President to help lead this effort."                                                                                                                                                                                                  
## [189] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [190] "It creates jobs by building a modern power grid."                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [191] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [192] "Our grids are vulnerable to storms, hacks, and catastrophic failures – with tragic results as we saw in Texas and elsewhere during winter storms."                                                                                                             
## [193] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [194] "The American Jobs Plan will create jobs to lay thousands of miles of transmission lines needed to build a resilient and fully clean grid."                                                                                                                     
## [195] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [196] "The American Jobs Plan will help millions of people get back to their jobs and their careers."                                                                                                                                                                 
## [197] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [198] "2 million women have dropped out of the workforce during this pandemic, too often because they couldn’t get the care they need for their family, their children."                                                                                              
## [199] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [200] "800,000 families are on a Medicaid waiting list right now to get homecare for their aging parent or loved one with a disability."                                                                                                                              
## [201] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [202] "This plan will help these families and create jobs for our caregivers with better wages and better benefits."                                                                                                                                                  
## [203] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [204] "For too long, we have failed to use the most important word when it comes to meeting the climate crisis."                                                                                                                                                      
## [205] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [206] "Jobs. Jobs."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   
## [207] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [208] "For me, when I think about climate change, I think jobs."                                                                                                                                                                                                      
## [209] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [210] "The American Jobs Plan will put engineers and construction workers to work building more energy efficient buildings and homes."                                                                                                                                
## [211] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [212] "Electrical workers installing 500,000 charging stations along our highways."                                                                                                                                                                                   
## [213] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [214] "Farmers planting cover crops, so they can reduce carbon dioxide in the air and get paid for doing it."                                                                                                                                                         
## [215] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [216] "There’s no reason the blades for wind turbines can’t be built in Pittsburgh instead of Beijing."                                                                                                                                                               
## [217] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [218] "No reason why American workers can’t lead the world in the production of electric vehicles and batteries."                                                                                                                                                     
## [219] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [220] "The American Jobs Plan will create millions of good paying jobs – jobs Americans can raise their families on."                                                                                                                                                 
## [221] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [222] "And all the investments in the American Jobs Plan will be guided by one principle: “Buy American.”"                                                                                                                                                            
## [223] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [224] "American tax dollars are going to be used to buy American products made in America that create American jobs."                                                                                                                                                 
## [225] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [226] "The way it should be."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
## [227] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [228] "Now – I know some of you at home are wondering whether these jobs are for you."                                                                                                                                                                                
## [229] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [230] "You feel left behind and forgotten in an economy that’s rapidly changing."                                                                                                                                                                                     
## [231] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [232] "Let me speak directly to you."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
## [233] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [234] "Independent experts estimate the American Jobs Plan will add millions of jobs and trillions of dollars in economic growth for years to come."                                                                                                                  
## [235] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [236] "These are good-paying jobs that can’t be outsourced."                                                                                                                                                                                                          
## [237] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [238] "Nearly 90% of the infrastructure jobs created in the American Jobs Plan do not require a college degree."                                                                                                                                                      
## [239] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [240] "75% do not require an associate’s degree."                                                                                                                                                                                                                     
## [241] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [242] "The American Jobs Plan is a blue-collar blueprint to build America."                                                                                                                                                                                           
## [243] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [244] "And, it recognizes something I’ve always said."                                                                                                                                                                                                                
## [245] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [246] "Wall Street didn’t build this country. The middle class built this country. And unions build the middle class."                                                                                                                                                
## [247] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [248] "And that’s why I’m calling on Congress to pass the Protecting the Right to Organize Act – the PRO Act — and send it to my desk to support the right to unionize."                                                                                              
## [249] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [250] "By the way – let’s also pass the $15 minimum wage."                                                                                                                                                                                                            
## [251] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [252] "No one should work 40 hours a week and still live below the poverty line."                                                                                                                                                                                     
## [253] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [254] "And we need to ensure greater equity and opportunity for women."                                                                                                                                                                                               
## [255] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [256] "Let’s get the Paycheck Fairness Act to my desk for equal pay."                                                                                                                                                                                                 
## [257] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [258] "It’s long past time."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          
## [259] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [260] "Finally, the American Jobs Plan will be the biggest increase in non-defense research and development on record."                                                                                                                                               
## [261] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [262] "We will see more technological change in the next 10 years – than we saw in the last 50 years."                                                                                                                                                                
## [263] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [264] "And we’re falling behind in that competition."                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
## [265] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [266] "Decades ago we used to invest 2% of our GDP on research and development."                                                                                                                                                                                      
## [267] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [268] "Today, we spend less than 1%."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
## [269] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [270] "China and other countries are closing in fast."                                                                                                                                                                                                                
## [271] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [272] "We have to develop and dominate the products and technologies of the future: advanced batteries, biotechnology, computer chips, and clean energy."                                                                                                             
## [273] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [274] "The Defense Department has an agency called DARPA – the Defense Advanced Research Projects Agency – that’s there to develop breakthroughs to enhance our national security – which led to the internet and GPS and so much more."                              
## [275] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [276] "The National Institutes of Health, the NIH – should create a similar Advanced Research Projects Agency for health."                                                                                                                                            
## [277] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [278] "To develop breakthroughs – to prevent, detect, and treat diseases like Alzheimer’s, diabetes, and cancer."                                                                                                                                                     
## [279] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [280] "This is personal to so many of us."                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
## [281] "I can think of no more worthy investment. And I know of nothing that is more bipartisan."                                                                                                                                                                      
## [282] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [283] "Let’s end cancer as we know it. It’s within our power"                                                                                                                                                                                                         
## [284] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [285] "Investments in jobs and infrastructure like the ones we’re talking about have often had bipartisan support."                                                                                                                                                   
## [286] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [287] "Vice President Harris and I meet regularly in the Oval Office with Democrats and Republicans to discuss the American Jobs Plan."                                                                                                                               
## [288] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [289] "And I applaud a group of Republican Senators who just put forward their proposal."                                                                                                                                                                             
## [290] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [291] "So, let’s get to work."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        
## [292] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [293] "We welcome ideas."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
## [294] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [295] "But, the rest of the world isn’t waiting for us. Doing nothing is not an option."                                                                                                                                                                              
## [296] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [297] "We can’t be so busy competing with each other that we forget the competition is with the rest of the world to win the 21st Century."                                                                                                                           
## [298] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [299] "To win that competition for the future, we also need to make a once-in-a-generation investment in our families – in our children."                                                                                                                             
## [300] ""
