## [301] "That’s why I’m introducing the American Families Plan tonight, which addresses four of the biggest challenges facing American families today."                                                                                                                 
## [302] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [303] "First, access to a good education."                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
## [304] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [305] "When this nation made 12 years of public education universal in the last century, it made us the best-educated and best-prepared nation in the world."                                                                                                         
## [306] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [307] "But the world is catching up. They are not waiting."                                                                                                                                                                                                           
## [308] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [309] "12 years is no longer enough today to compete in the 21st Century."                                                                                                                                                                                            
## [310] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [311] "That’s why the American Families Plan guarantees four additional years of public education for every person in America – starting as early as we can."                                                                                                         
## [312] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [313] "We add two years of universal high-quality pre-school for every 3- and 4- year-old in America."                                                                                                                                                                
## [314] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [315] "The research shows that when a young child goes to school—not day care—they are far more likely to graduate from high school and go on to college."                                                                                                            
## [316] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [317] "And then we add two years of free community college."                                                                                                                                                                                                          
## [318] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [319] "And we will increase Pell Grants and investment in Historically Black Colleges and Universities, Tribal colleges, and minority-serving institutions."                                                                                                          
## [320] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [321] "Jill is a community college professor who teaches today as First Lady."                                                                                                                                                                                        
## [322] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [323] "She has long said any country that out-educates us is going to outcompete us – and she’ll be leading this effort."                                                                                                                                             
## [324] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [325] "Second, the American Families plan will provide access to quality, affordable child care."                                                                                                                                                                     
## [326] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [327] "We guarantee that low- to middle-income families will pay no more than 7% of their income for high-quality care for children up to the age of 5."                                                                                                              
## [328] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [329] "The most hard-pressed working families won’t have to spend a dime."                                                                                                                                                                                            
## [330] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [331] "Third, the American Families Plan will finally provide up to 12 weeks of paid family and medical leave."                                                                                                                                                       
## [332] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [333] "No one should have to choose between a job and paycheck or taking care of themselves and a loved one – a parent, spouse, or child."                                                                                                                            
## [334] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [335] "And fourth, the American Families Plan puts money directly into the pockets of millions of families."                                                                                                                                                          
## [336] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [337] "In March we expanded a tax credit for every child in a family."                                                                                                                                                                                                
## [338] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [339] "Up to a $3,000 Child Tax Credit for children over 6 — and $3,600 for children under 6."                                                                                                                                                                        
## [340] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [341] "With two parents, two kids, that’s up to $7,200 in your pocket to help take care of your family."                                                                                                                                                              
## [342] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [343] "This will help more than 65 million children and help cut child poverty in half this year."                                                                                                                                                                    
## [344] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [345] "Together, let’s extend the Child Tax Credit at least through the end of 2025."                                                                                                                                                                                 
## [346] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [347] "The American Rescue Plan lowered health care premiums for 9 million Americans who buy their coverage under the Affordable Care Act."                                                                                                                           
## [348] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [349] "Let’s make that provision permanent so their premiums don’t go back up."                                                                                                                                                                                       
## [350] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [351] "In addition to my Families Plan, I will work with Congress to address –"                                                                                                                                                                                       
## [352] "this year – other critical priorities for America’s families."                                                                                                                                                                                                 
## [353] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [354] "The Affordable Care Act has been a lifeline for millions of Americans –protecting people with pre-existing conditions, protecting women’s health."                                                                                                             
## [355] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [356] "What the News Means for You and Your Money"                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
## [357] "Understand how today’s business practices, market dynamics, tax policies and more impact you with real-time news and analysis from MarketWatch."                                                                                                               
## [358] "SUBSCRIBE NOW: 50% OFF 1 YEAR"                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
## [359] "MarketWatch on Multiple devices"                                                                                                                                                                                                                               
## [360] "And the pandemic has demonstrated how badly it is needed."                                                                                                                                                                                                     
## [361] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [362] "Let’s lower deductibles for working families on the Affordable Care Act, and let’s lower prescription drug costs."                                                                                                                                             
## [363] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [364] "We all know how outrageously expensive they are."                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [365] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [366] "In fact, we pay the highest prescription drug prices in the world right here in America – nearly three times as much as other countries."                                                                                                                      
## [367] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [368] "We can change that."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           
## [369] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [370] "Let’s do what we’ve always talked about."                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
## [371] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [372] "Let’s give Medicare the power to save hundreds of billions of dollars by negotiating lower prices for prescription drugs."                                                                                                                                     
## [373] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [374] "That won’t just help people on Medicare – it will lower prescription drug costs for everyone."                                                                                                                                                                 
## [375] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [376] "The money we save can go to strengthen the Affordable Care Act – expand Medicare coverage and benefits – without costing taxpayers one additional penny."                                                                                                      
## [377] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [378] "We’ve talked about it long enough – Democrats and Republicans."                                                                                                                                                                                                
## [379] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [380] "Let’s get it done this year."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  
## [381] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [382] "This is all about a simple premise: Health care should be a right, not a privilege in America."                                                                                                                                                                
## [383] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [384] "So how do we pay for my Jobs and Family Plans?"                                                                                                                                                                                                                
## [385] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [386] "I’ve made clear that we can do it without increasing deficits."                                                                                                                                                                                                
## [387] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [388] "Let’s start with what I will not do."                                                                                                                                                                                                                          
## [389] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [390] "I will not impose any tax increases on people making less than $400,000 a year."                                                                                                                                                                               
## [391] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [392] "It’s time for corporate America and the wealthiest 1% of Americans to pay their fair share."                                                                                                                                                                   
## [393] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [394] "Just pay their fair share."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
## [395] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [396] "A recent study shows that 55 of the nation’s biggest corporations paid zero in federal income tax last year."                                                                                                                                                  
## [397] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [398] "No federal taxes on more than $40 billion in profits."                                                                                                                                                                                                         
## [399] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [400] "A lot of companies evade taxes through tax havens from Switzerland to Bermuda to the Cayman Islands."                                                                                                                                                          
## [401] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [402] "And they benefit from tax loopholes and deductions that allow for offshoring jobs and shifting profits overseas."                                                                                                                                              
## [403] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [404] "That’s not right."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
## [405] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [406] "We’re going to reform corporate taxes so they pay their fair share – and help pay for the public investments their businesses will benefit from."                                                                                                              
## [407] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [408] "And, we’re going to reward work, not wealth."                                                                                                                                                                                                                  
## [409] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [410] "We take the top tax bracket for the wealthiest 1% of Americans –"                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [411] "those making $400,000 or more – back up to 39.6%."                                                                                                                                                                                                             
## [412] "We take the top tax bracket for the wealthiest 1% of Americans – those making $400,000 or more – back up to 39.6%."                                                                                                                                            
## [413] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [414] "That’s where it was when George W. Bush became president."                                                                                                                                                                                                     
## [415] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [416] "We’re going to get rid of the loopholes that allow Americans who make more than $1 million a year pay a lower rate on their capital gains than working Americans pay on their work."                                                                           
## [417] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [418] "This will only affect three tenths of 1% of all Americans."                                                                                                                                                                                                    
## [419] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [420] "And the IRS will crack down on millionaires and billionaires who cheat on their taxes."                                                                                                                                                                        
## [421] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [422] "That’s estimated to be billions of dollars."                                                                                                                                                                                                                   
## [423] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [424] "Look, I’m not out to punish anyone."                                                                                                                                                                                                                           
## [425] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [426] "But I will not add to the tax burden of the middle class of this country."                                                                                                                                                                                     
## [427] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [428] "They’re already paying enough."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
## [429] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [430] "What I’ve proposed is fair. It’s fiscally responsible."                                                                                                                                                                                                        
## [431] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [432] "It raises the revenue to pay for the plans I’ve proposed that will create millions of jobs and grow the economy."                                                                                                                                              
## [433] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [434] "When you hear someone say that they don’t want to raise taxes on the wealthiest 1% and on corporate America – ask them: whose taxes are you going to raise instead, and whose are you going to cut?"                                                           
## [435] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [436] "Look at the big tax cut in 2017."                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [437] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [438] "It was supposed to pay for itself and generate vast economic growth."                                                                                                                                                                                          
## [439] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [440] "Instead it added $2 trillion to the deficit."                                                                                                                                                                                                                  
## [441] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [442] "It was a huge windfall for corporate America and those at the very top."                                                                                                                                                                                       
## [443] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [444] "Instead of using the tax savings to raise wages and invest in research and development – it poured billions of dollars into the pockets of CEOs."                                                                                                              
## [445] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [446] "In fact, the pay gap between CEOs and their workers is now among the largest in history."                                                                                                                                                                      
## [447] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [448] "According to one study, CEOs make 320 times what their average workers make."                                                                                                                                                                                  
## [449] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [450] "The pandemic has only made things worse."                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
## [451] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [452] "20 million Americans lost their jobs in the pandemic – working- and middle-class Americans."                                                                                                                                                                   
## [453] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [454] "At the same time, the roughly 650 Billionaires in America saw their net worth increase by more than $1 Trillion."                                                                                                                                              
## [455] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [456] "Let me say that again."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        
## [457] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [458] "Just 650 people increased their wealth by more than $1 Trillion during this pandemic."                                                                                                                                                                         
## [459] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [460] "They are now worth more than $4 Trillion."                                                                                                                                                                                                                     
## [461] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [462] "My fellow Americans, trickle-down economics has"                                                                                                                                                                                                               
## [463] "never worked."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
## [464] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [465] "It’s time to grow the economy from the bottom up and middle-out."                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [466] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [467] "A broad consensus of economists – left, right, center – agree that what I’m proposing will help create millions of jobs and generate historic economic growth."                                                                                                
## [468] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [469] "These are among the highest value investments we can make as a nation."                                                                                                                                                                                        
## [470] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [471] "I’ve often said that our greatest strength is the power of our example – not just the example of our power."                                                                                                                                                   
## [472] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [473] "And in my conversations with world leaders – many I’ve known for a long time – the comment I hear most often is: we see that America is back – but for how long?"                                                                                              
## [474] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [475] "My fellow Americans, we have to show not just that we are back, but that we are here to stay."                                                                                                                                                                 
## [476] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [477] "And that we aren’t going it alone – we’re going to be leading with our allies."                                                                                                                                                                                
## [478] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [479] "No one nation can deal with all the crises of our time alone – from terrorism to nuclear proliferation to mass migration, cybersecurity, climate change – and as we’re experiencing now, pandemics."                                                           
## [480] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [481] "There’s no wall high enough to keep any virus away."                                                                                                                                                                                                           
## [482] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [483] "As our own vaccine supply grows to meet our needs – and we are meeting them – we will become an arsenal of vaccines for other countries – just as America was the arsenal of democracy in World War 2."                                                        
## [484] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [485] "The climate crisis is not our fight alone, either."                                                                                                                                                                                                            
## [486] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [487] "It’s a global fight."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          
## [488] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [489] "The United States accounts for less than 15% of carbon emissions."                                                                                                                                                                                             
## [490] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [491] "The rest of the world accounts for 85%."                                                                                                                                                                                                                       
## [492] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [493] "That’s why – I kept my commitment to rejoin the Paris Climate Agreement on my first day in office."                                                                                                                                                            
## [494] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [495] "And I kept my commitment to convene a climate summit right here in America, with all of the major economies of the world – from China and Russia to India and the European Union in my first 100 days."                                                        
## [496] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [497] "I wanted the world to see that there is consensus that we are at an inflection point in history."                                                                                                                                                              
## [498] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [499] "And the consensus is if we act, we can save the planet – and we can create millions of jobs and economic growth and opportunity to raise the standard of living for everyone in the world."                                                                    
## [500] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [501] "The investments I’ve proposed tonight also advance a foreign policy that benefits the middle class."                                                                                                                                                           
## [502] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [503] "That means making sure every nation plays by the same rules in the global economy, including China."                                                                                                                                                           
## [504] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [505] "In my discussion with President Xi, I told him that we welcome the competition – and that we are not looking for conflict."                                                                                                                                    
## [506] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [507] "But I made absolutely clear that I will defend American interests across the board."                                                                                                                                                                           
## [508] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [509] "America will stand up to unfair trade practices that undercut American workers and industries, like subsidies for state-owned enterprises and the theft of American technologies and intellectual property."                                                   
## [510] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [511] "I also told President Xi that we will maintain a strong military presence in the Indo—Pacific just as we do with NATO in Europe – not to start conflict – but to prevent conflict."                                                                            
## [512] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [513] "And, I told him what I’ve said to many world leaders – that America won’t back away from our commitment to human rights and fundamental freedoms."                                                                                                             
## [514] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [515] "No responsible American president can remain silent when basic human rights are violated. A president has to represent the essence of our country."                                                                                                            
## [516] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [517] "America is an idea – unique in the world."                                                                                                                                                                                                                     
## [518] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [519] "We are all created equal. It’s who we are. We cannot walk away from that principle."                                                                                                                                                                           
## [520] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [521] "With regard to Russia, I made very clear to President Putin that while we don’t seek escalation, their actions have consequences."                                                                                                                             
## [522] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [523] "I responded in a direct and proportionate way to Russia’s interference in our elections and cyber—attacks on our government and businesses – and they did both of those things and I did respond."                                                             
## [524] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [525] "But we can also cooperate when it’s in our mutual interests."                                                                                                                                                                                                  
## [526] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [527] "As we did when we extended the New START Treaty on nuclear arms – and as we’re working to do on the climate crisis."                                                                                                                                           
## [528] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [529] "On Iran and North Korea’s nuclear programs that present a serious threat to America’s security and world security – we will be working closely with our allies to address the threats posed by both of these countries through diplomacy and stern deterrence."
## [530] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [531] "And American leadership means ending the forever war in Afghanistan."                                                                                                                                                                                          
## [532] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [533] "We have the greatest fighting force in the history of the world."                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [534] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [535] "And I’m the first President in 40 years who knows what it means to have had a child serving in a warzone."                                                                                                                                                     
## [536] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [537] "Today we have service members serving in the same war as their parents once did."                                                                                                                                                                              
## [538] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [539] "We have service members in Afghanistan who were not yet born on 9/11."                                                                                                                                                                                         
## [540] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [541] "War in Afghanistan was never meant to be a multi—generational undertaking of nation—building."                                                                                                                                                                 
## [542] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [543] "We went to Afghanistan to get the terrorists who attacked us on 9/11."                                                                                                                                                                                         
## [544] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [545] "We delivered justice to Osama Bin Laden and we degraded the terrorist threat of al Qaeda in Afghanistan."                                                                                                                                                      
## [546] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [547] "After 20 years of American valor and sacrifice, it’s time to bring our troops home."                                                                                                                                                                           
## [548] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [549] "Even as we do, we will maintain an over—the—horizon capability to suppress future threats to the homeland."                                                                                                                                                    
## [550] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [551] "But make no mistake – the terrorist threat has evolved beyond Afghanistan since 2001 and we will remain vigilant against threats to the United States, wherever they come from."                                                                               
## [552] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [553] "Al Qaeda and ISIS are in Yemen, Syria, Somalia, and other places in Africa and the Middle East and beyond."                                                                                                                                                    
## [554] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [555] "And, we won’t ignore what our own intelligence agencies have determined – the most lethal terrorist threat to the homeland today is from white supremacist terrorism."                                                                                         
## [556] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [557] "And my fellow Americans, we must come together to heal the soul of this nation."                                                                                                                                                                               
## [558] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [559] "It was nearly a year ago before her father’s funeral, when I spoke with Gianna Floyd, George Floyd’s young daughter."                                                                                                                                          
## [560] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [561] "As I knelt down to talk to her so we could talk eye—to—eye, she said to me, “Daddy changed the world.”"                                                                                                                                                        
## [562] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [563] "After the conviction of George Floyd’s murderer, we can see how right she was – if we have the courage to act."                                                                                                                                                
## [564] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [565] "We have all seen the knee of injustice on the neck of Black America."                                                                                                                                                                                          
## [566] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [567] "Now is our opportunity to make real progress."                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
## [568] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [569] "Most men and women in uniform wear their badge and serve their communities honorably."                                                                                                                                                                         
## [570] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [571] "I know them. I know they want to help meet this moment as well."                                                                                                                                                                                               
## [572] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [573] "My fellow Americans, we have to come together."                                                                                                                                                                                                                
## [574] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [575] "To rebuild trust between law enforcement and the people they serve."                                                                                                                                                                                           
## [576] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [577] "To root out systemic racism in our criminal justice system."                                                                                                                                                                                                   
## [578] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [579] "And to enact police reform in George Floyd’s name that passed the House already."                                                                                                                                                                              
## [580] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [581] "I know the Republicans have their own ideas and are engaged in productive discussions with Democrats."                                                                                                                                                         
## [582] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [583] "We need to work together to find a consensus."                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
## [584] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [585] "Let’s get it done next month, by the first anniversary of George Floyd’s death."                                                                                                                                                                               
## [586] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [587] "The country supports this reform."                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
## [588] "Congress should act."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          
## [589] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [590] "We have a giant opportunity to bend to the arc of the moral universe toward justice."                                                                                                                                                                          
## [591] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [592] "Real justice."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
## [593] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [594] "And with the plans I outlined tonight, we have a real chance to root out systemic racism that plagues American life in many other ways."                                                                                                                       
## [595] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [596] "A chance to deliver real equity."                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [597] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [598] "Good jobs and good schools. Affordable housing. Clean air and clean water."                                                                                                                                                                                    
## [599] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [600] "Being able to generate wealth and pass it down through generations."
