## [601] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [602] "Real opportunities in the lives of more Americans – Black, white, Latino, Asian American, Native American."                                                                                                                                                    
## [603] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [604] "I also want to thank the Senate for voting 94—1 to pass the COVID—19 Hate Crimes Act to protect Asian Americans and Pacific Islanders from the vicious hate crimes we’ve seen this past year – and for too long."                                              
## [605] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [606] "I urge the House to do the same and send that legislation to my desk as soon as possible."                                                                                                                                                                     
## [607] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [608] "I also hope Congress can get to my desk the Equality Act to protect the rights of LGBTQ Americans."                                                                                                                                                            
## [609] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [610] "To all the transgender Americans watching at home – especially the young people who are so brave – I want you to know that your president has your back."                                                                                                      
## [611] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [612] "And another thing."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
## [613] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [614] "Let’s reauthorize the Violence Against Women Act, which has been law in this country for 27 years since I first wrote it."                                                                                                                                     
## [615] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [616] "It will close the so—called “boyfriend” loophole to keep guns out of the hands of abusers."                                                                                                                                                                    
## [617] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [618] "It’s estimated that more than 50 women are shot and killed by an intimate partner – every month in America."                                                                                                                                                   
## [619] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [620] "Pass it and save lives."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       
## [621] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [622] "And I need not tell anyone this, but gun violence is an epidemic in America."                                                                                                                                                                                  
## [623] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [624] "Our flag at the White House was still flying at half—staff for the 8 victims of the mass shooting in Georgia, when 10 more lives were taken in a mass shooting in Colorado."                                                                                   
## [625] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [626] "In the week between those mass shootings, more than 250 other Americans were shot dead."                                                                                                                                                                       
## [627] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [628] "250 shot dead."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
## [629] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [630] "I know how hard it is to make progress on this issue."                                                                                                                                                                                                         
## [631] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [632] "In the 1990s, we passed universal background checks and a ban on assault weapons and high—capacity magazines that hold 100 rounds that can be fired in seconds."                                                                                               
## [633] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [634] "We beat the NRA. Mass shootings and gun violence declined."                                                                                                                                                                                                    
## [635] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [636] "But in the early 2000’s, that law expired and we’ve seen the daily bloodshed since."                                                                                                                                                                           
## [637] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [638] "More than two weeks ago in the Rose Garden, surrounded by some of the bravest people I know – the survivors and families who lost loved ones to gun violence – I laid out several steps the Department of Justice is taking to end this epidemic."             
## [639] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [640] "One of them is banning so—called “ghost guns.”"                                                                                                                                                                                                                
## [641] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [642] "They are homemade guns built from a kit that includes the directions on how to finish the firearm."                                                                                                                                                            
## [643] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [644] "The parts have no serial numbers, so when they show up at a crime scene, they can’t be traced."                                                                                                                                                                
## [645] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [646] "The buyers of ghost gun kits aren’t required to pass a background check."                                                                                                                                                                                      
## [647] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [648] "Anyone from a criminal to a terrorist could buy this kit and, in as little as 30 minutes, put together a lethal weapon."                                                                                                                                       
## [649] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [650] "But not anymore."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [651] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [652] "I will do everything in my power to protect the American people from this epidemic of gun violence."                                                                                                                                                           
## [653] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [654] "But it’s time for Congress to act as well."                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
## [655] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [656] "We need more Senate Republicans to join with the overwhelming majority of their Democratic colleagues, and close loopholes and require background checks to purchase a gun."                                                                                   
## [657] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [658] "And we need a ban on assault weapons and high—capacity magazines again."                                                                                                                                                                                       
## [659] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [660] "Don’t tell me it can’t be done. We’ve done it before … and it worked."                                                                                                                                                                                         
## [661] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [662] "Talk to most responsible gun owners, most hunters – they’ll tell you there’s no possible justification for having 100 rounds – 100 bullets – in a weapon."                                                                                                     
## [663] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [664] "They will tell you that there are too many people today who are able to buy a gun, but who shouldn’t be able to."                                                                                                                                              
## [665] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [666] "These kinds of reasonable reforms have the overwhelming support of the American people – including many gun owners."                                                                                                                                           
## [667] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [668] "The country supports reform, and the Congress should act."                                                                                                                                                                                                     
## [669] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [670] "This shouldn’t be a Red vs. Blue issue. It’s an American issue."                                                                                                                                                                                               
## [671] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [672] "And here’s what else we can do."                                                                                                                                                                                                                               
## [673] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [674] "Immigration has always been essential to America."                                                                                                                                                                                                             
## [675] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [676] "Let’s end our exhausting war over immigration."                                                                                                                                                                                                                
## [677] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [678] "For more than 30 years, politicians have talked about immigration reform and done nothing about it."                                                                                                                                                           
## [679] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [680] "It’s time to fix it."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          
## [681] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [682] "On day one of my Presidency, I kept my commitment and I sent a comprehensive immigration bill to Congress."                                                                                                                                                    
## [683] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [684] "If you believe we need a secure border – pass it."                                                                                                                                                                                                             
## [685] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [686] "If you believe in a pathway to citizenship – pass it."                                                                                                                                                                                                         
## [687] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [688] "If you actually want to solve the problem – I have sent you a bill, now pass it."                                                                                                                                                                              
## [689] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [690] "We also have to get at the root of the problem of why people are fleeing to our southern border from Guatemala, Honduras, El Salvador."                                                                                                                        
## [691] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [692] "The violence. The corruption. The gangs. The political instability. Hunger. Hurricanes. Earthquakes."                                                                                                                                                          
## [693] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [694] "When I was Vice President, I focused on providing the help needed to address these root causes of migration."                                                                                                                                                  
## [695] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [696] "It helped keep people in their own countries instead of being forced to leave."                                                                                                                                                                                
## [697] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [698] "Our plan worked."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [699] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [700] "But the last administration shut it down."                                                                                                                                                                                                                     
## [701] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [702] "I’m restoring the program and asked Vice President Harris to lead our diplomatic efforts."                                                                                                                                                                     
## [703] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [704] "I have absolute confidence she will get the job done."                                                                                                                                                                                                         
## [705] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [706] "Now, if Congress won’t pass my plan – let’s at least pass what we agree on."                                                                                                                                                                                   
## [707] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [708] "Congress needs to pass legislation this year to finally secure protection for the Dreamers – the young people who have only known America as their home."                                                                                                      
## [709] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [710] "And, permanent protections for immigrants on temporary protected status who come from countries beset by man—made and natural made violence and disaster."                                                                                                     
## [711] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [712] "As well as a pathway to citizenship for farmworkers who put food on our tables."                                                                                                                                                                               
## [713] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [714] "Immigrants have done so much for America during the pandemic – as they have throughout our history."                                                                                                                                                           
## [715] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [716] "The country supports immigration reform."                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
## [717] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [718] "Congress should act."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          
## [719] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [720] "And if we are to truly restore the soul of America – we need to protect the sacred right to vote."                                                                                                                                                             
## [721] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [722] "More people voted in the last presidential election than ever before"                                                                                                                                                                                          
## [723] "in our history – in the middle of one of the worst pandemics ever."                                                                                                                                                                                            
## [724] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [725] "That should be celebrated. Instead it’s being attacked."                                                                                                                                                                                                       
## [726] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [727] "Congress should pass H.R. 1 and the John Lewis Voting Rights Act and send them to my desk right away."                                                                                                                                                         
## [728] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [729] "The country supports it."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
## [730] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [731] "Congress should act."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          
## [732] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [733] "As we gather here tonight, the images of a violent mob assaulting this Capitol—desecrating our democracy—remain vivid in our minds."                                                                                                                           
## [734] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [735] "Lives were put at risk. Lives were lost. Extraordinary courage was summoned."                                                                                                                                                                                  
## [736] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [737] "The insurrection was an existential crisis—a test of whether our democracy could survive."                                                                                                                                                                     
## [738] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [739] "It did."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       
## [740] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [741] "But the struggle is far from over. The question of whether our democracy  will long endure is both ancient and urgent."                                                                                                                                        
## [742] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [743] "As old as our Republic. Still vital today."                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
## [744] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [745] "Can our democracy deliver on its promise that all of us – created equal in the image of God – have a chance to lead lives of dignity, respect, and possibility?"                                                                                               
## [746] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [747] "Can our democracy deliver on the most pressing needs of our people?"                                                                                                                                                                                           
## [748] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [749] "Can our democracy overcome the lies, anger, hate and fears that have pulled us apart?"                                                                                                                                                                         
## [750] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [751] "America’s adversaries – the autocrats of the world – are betting it can’t."                                                                                                                                                                                    
## [752] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [753] "They believe we are too full of anger and division and rage."                                                                                                                                                                                                  
## [754] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [755] "They look at the images of the mob that assaulted this Capitol as proof that the sun is setting on American democracy."                                                                                                                                        
## [756] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [757] "They are wrong. And we have to prove them wrong."                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [758] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [759] "We have to prove democracy still works."                                                                                                                                                                                                                       
## [760] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [761] "That our government still works – and can deliver for the people."                                                                                                                                                                                             
## [762] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [763] "In our first 100 Days together, we have acted to restore the people’s faith in our democracy to deliver."                                                                                                                                                      
## [764] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [765] "We’re vaccinating the nation. We’re creating hundreds of thousands of jobs. We’re delivering real results people can see and feel in their own lives."                                                                                                         
## [766] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [767] "Opening the doors of opportunity. Guaranteeing fairness and justice."                                                                                                                                                                                          
## [768] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [769] "That’s the essence of America."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
## [770] "That’s democracy in action."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   
## [771] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [772] "Our Constitution opens with the words, “We the People”."                                                                                                                                                                                                       
## [773] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [774] "It’s time we remembered that We the People are the government. You and I."                                                                                                                                                                                     
## [775] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [776] "Not some force in a distant capital. Not some powerful force we have no control over."                                                                                                                                                                         
## [777] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [778] "It’s us. It’s “We the people.”"                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
## [779] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [780] "In another era when our democracy was tested, Franklin Roosevelt reminded us—In America: we do our part."                                                                                                                                                      
## [781] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [782] "That’s all I’m asking. That we all do our part."                                                                                                                                                                                                               
## [783] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [784] "And if we do, then we will meet the central challenge of the age by proving that democracy is durable and strong."                                                                                                                                             
## [785] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [786] "The autocrats will not win the future."                                                                                                                                                                                                                        
## [787] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [788] "America will."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
## [789] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [790] "The future will belong to America."                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
## [791] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [792] "I stand here tonight before you in a new and vital hour in the life of our democracy and our nation."                                                                                                                                                          
## [793] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [794] "And I can say with absolute confidence: I have never been more confident or more optimistic about America."                                                                                                                                                    
## [795] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [796] "We have stared into an abyss of insurrection and autocracy — of pandemic and pain — and “We the People” did not flinch."                                                                                                                                       
## [797] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [798] "At the very moment our adversaries were certain we would pull apart and fail."                                                                                                                                                                                 
## [799] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [800] "We came together."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
## [801] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [802] "United."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       
## [803] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [804] "With light and hope, we summoned new strength and new resolve."                                                                                                                                                                                                
## [805] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [806] "To position us to win the competition for the 21st Century."                                                                                                                                                                                                   
## [807] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [808] "On our way forward to a Union more perfect. More prosperous. More just."                                                                                                                                                                                       
## [809] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [810] "As one people. One nation. One America."                                                                                                                                                                                                                       
## [811] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [812] "It’s never been a good bet to bet against America."                                                                                                                                                                                                            
## [813] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [814] "And it still isn’t."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           
## [815] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [816] "We are the United States of America."                                                                                                                                                                                                                          
## [817] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [818] "There is nothing – nothing – beyond our capacity – nothing we can’t do – if we do it together."                                                                                                                                                                
## [819] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [820] "May God bless you all."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        
## [821] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## [822] "May God protect our troops."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   
## [823] ""
readLines("C:/Users/Karol/Downloads/Biden2024.txt")
##   [1] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
##   [2] "(The President presents his prepared remarks to Speaker Johnson.) Your bedtime reading."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               
##   [3] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
##   [4] "Tony! Thank you. Looking for Jill."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
##   [5] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
##   [6] "Good evening. Good evening. If I were smart, I’d go home now."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
##   [7] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
##   [8] "Mr. Speaker, Madam Vice President, members of Congress, my fellow Americans."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          
##   [9] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
##  [10] "In January 1941, Franklin Roosevelt came to this chamber to speak to the nation. And he said, “I address you at a moment unprecedented in the history of the Union”. Hitler was on the march. War was raging in Europe."                                                                                                                                               
##  [11] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
##  [12] "President Roosevelt’s purpose was to wake up Congress and alert the American people that this was no ordinary time. Freedom and democracy were under assault in the world."                                                                                                                                                                                            
##  [13] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
##  [14] "Tonight, I come to the same chamber to address the nation. Now it’s we who face an unprecedented moment in the history of the Union."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  
##  [15] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
##  [16] "And, yes, my purpose tonight is to wake up the Congress and alert the American people that this is no ordinary moment either. Not since President Lincoln and the Civil War have freedom and democracy been under assault at home as they are today."                                                                                                                  
##  [17] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
##  [18] "What makes our moment rare is that freedom and democracy are under attack at — both at home and overseas at the very same time."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       
##  [19] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
##  [20] "Overseas, Putin of Russia is on the march, invading Ukraine and sowing chaos throughout Europe and beyond."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
##  [21] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
##  [22] "If anybody in this room thinks Putin will stop at Ukraine, I assure you: He will not."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
##  [23] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
##  [24] "But Ukraine — Ukraine can stop Putin. Ukraine can stop Putin if we stand with Ukraine and provide the weapons that it needs to defend itself."                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
##  [25] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
##  [26] "That is all — that is all Ukraine is asking. They’re not asking for American soldiers. In fact, there are no American soldiers at war in Ukraine, and I’m determined to keep it that way."                                                                                                                                                                             
##  [27] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
##  [28] "But now assistance to Ukraine is being blocked by those who want to walk away from our world leadership."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
##  [29] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
##  [30] "It wasn’t long ago when a Republican president named Ronald Reagan thundered, “Mr. Gorbachev, tear down this wall.”"                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   
##  [31] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
##  [32] "Now — now my predecessor, a former Republican president, tells Putin, quote, “Do whatever the hell you want.”"                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
##  [33] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
##  [34] "That’s a quote."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       
##  [35] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
##  [36] "A former president actually said that — bowing down to a Russian leader. I think it’s outrageous, it’s dangerous, and it’s unacceptable."                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
##  [37] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
##  [38] "America is a founding member of NATO, the military alliance of democratic nations created after World War Two prevent — to prevent war and keep the peace."                                                                                                                                                                                                            
##  [39] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
##  [40] "And today, we’ve made NATO stronger than ever. We welcomed Finland to the Alliance last year. And just this morning, Sweden officially joined, and their minister is here tonight. Stand up. Welcome. Welcome, welcome, welcome. And they know how to fight."                                                                                                          
##  [41] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
##  [42] "Mr. Prime Minister, welcome to NATO, the strongest military alliance the world has ever seen."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
##  [43] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
##  [44] "I say this to Congress: We have to stand up to Putin. Send me a bipartisan national security bill. History is literally watching. History is watching."                                                                                                                                                                                                                
##  [45] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
##  [46] "If the United States walks away, it will put Ukraine"                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  
##  [47] "at risk. Europe is at risk. The free world will be at risk, emboldening others to do what they wish to do us harm."                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
##  [48] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
##  [49] "My message to President Putin, who I’ve known for a long time, is simple: We will not walk away. We will not bow down. I will not bow down."                                                                                                                                                                                                                           
##  [50] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
##  [51] "In a literal sense, history is watching. History is watching — just like history watched three years ago on January 6th — when insurrectionists stormed this very Capitol and placed a dagger to the throat of American democracy."                                                                                                                                    
##  [52] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
##  [53] "Many of you were here on that darkest of days. We all saw with our own eyes the insurrectionists were not patriots. They had come to stop the peaceful transfer of power, to overturn the will of the people."                                                                                                                                                         
##  [54] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
##  [55] "January 6th lies about the 2020 election and the plots to steal the election posed a great — gravest threat to U.S. democracy since the Civil War."                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
##  [56] ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
##  [57] "But they failed. America stood — America stood strong and democracy prevailed.
